summary: Decompiled and typed more of src/melee/vi/vi1201v2, centered on un_80320A40_OnEnter. The PR added includes, local data declarations, asset-string/data layout for un_80400304, typed un_804D7028 as GXColor, added JObj setter helper variants, and updated the public header prototype for un_80320A40_OnEnter. Bot report showed one new .sdata match, improvements in un_80320A40_OnEnter, .data, and .sbss, and a small .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Main decompilation work: added dependencies, recovered local data layout, typed globals, implemented un_80320A40_OnEnter, and added local HSD_JObj setter helper variants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vi1201v2.c include additions and un_80400304_t definition
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for main/melee/vi/vi1201v2

key_files.role: Header update: added GXStruct include, changed un_804D7028 extern from u8 to GXColor, and updated OnEnter prototype from UNK_T to void*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vi1201v2.h GXColor extern and void* prototype changes

what_changed.text: Added vi1201v2.c includes for baselib forward declarations, effects, ft_0C31, lb_00B0, lbarchive, and toy headers to support the recovered function body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include block additions in src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c

what_changed.text: Replaced Vec3 un_80400304 with a structured data block containing player_spawn plus assert/asset/resource strings such as Vi1201v2.dat, visual1201v2Scene, TyKoopa.dat, ToyKoopaModel_TopN_joint, GmRgStnd.dat, and standScene.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct un_80400304_t and initializer for un_80400304

what_changed.text: Adjusted Player_80032768 call to pass &un_80400304.player_spawn after structuring un_80400304.
Typed un_804D7028 as GXColor and changed erase-color setup from byte indexing to field accesses r, g, b, and a.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GXColor un_804D7028 and HSD_SetEraseColor(colors->r, colors->g, colors->b, colors->a)

what_changed.text: Added static JObj setter helper variants for rotation Y, scale XYZ, and translate XYZ that include jobj asserts and call ftCo_800C6AFC when JOBJ_MTX_INDEP_SRT is not set.

Added un_80320A40_OnEnter implementation that initializes effects/audio, loads archives and symbols, creates camera/model/fog/light GObjs, loads JObjs, applies transforms and scale, and stores fog color.
Updated un_80320A40_OnEnter header prototype from UNK_T to void*.

smart_moves.text: Recovered a concrete GXColor type for un_804D7028 and propagated it to the header, improving readability and replacing raw byte-color access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u8* colors changed to GXColor* colors
raw_diff: extern u8 un_804D7028 changed to extern GXColor un_804D7028

smart_moves.text: Kept the header in sync with the recovered OnEnter argument type instead of leaving the public declaration as UNK_T.
Grouped adjacent data and strings into a temporary struct so existing offset-based string uses could be expressed relative to one recovered data block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_80400304_t fields and char* data = (char*) &un_804002F8
raw_diff: lbArchive_LoadSymbols(data + 0x40, data + 0x50, data + 0x64, data + 0x70, data + 0x8C, data + 0x9C)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a body proves a global's real type, update both the source and header declarations; here a GXColor global enabled field-based color access and an owning header include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #include "dolphin/gx/GXStruct.h" and extern GXColor un_804D7028 in .h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function signatures should replace placeholder prototypes when the implementation makes the argument type concrete enough for review; this PR changed OnEnter from UNK_T to void* after adding a body that casts arg to u8*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: header prototype changed from UNK_T to void*

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style symbol names were preserved for unresolved globals and functions, while local variables used role names such as input, cobj, fog, gobj, child, jobj, scale, and colors.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declarations in un_80320A40_OnEnter and un_803208F0

naming_conventions.convention: Temporary data-struct field names encode observed resource roles where strings directly support them, such as vi1201v2_dat, visual1201v2_scene, tykoopa_dat, toykoopa_model_topn_joint, gmrgstnd_dat, and stand_scene.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_80400304_t field names and string initializer

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a temporary aggregate struct over adjacent data/string storage to preserve offsets while giving the player spawn vector a typed field.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_80400304_t layout and Player_80032768 uses .player_spawn
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence shows data progress but not the rationale for every string being grouped into this struct.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used static local HSD_JObjSet*_2 helper variants with expanded assertions and explicit ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation calls, apparently to match the local call shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_JObjSetRotationY_2 and scale/translate helper variants
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review comments or author notes explain why existing HSD_JObjSet* inlines were insufficient; loaded standards would require caution around expanded header asserts.
Bot report shows function improvement to 97.14%, but the slice does not provide narrow evidence that PAD_STACK was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Tracked code/data progress through bot checkdiff-style report: un_80320A40_OnEnter improved by 1659 bytes to 97.14%, .sdata became 100%, .data and .sbss improved, and .sdata2 regressed slightly.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The report does not claim full text match for un_80320A40_OnEnter.

review_feedback.feedback: Automated report for GALE01 showed one new match in main/melee/vi/vi1201v2 .sdata (+16 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%), improvements in un_80320A40_OnEnter (+1659 bytes, 0.00% to 97.14%), .data (+123 bytes, 25.00% to 98.80%), and .sbss (+13 bytes, 62.50% to 91.67%), plus a .sdata2 regression (-2 bytes, 76.92% to 71.43%).

follow_up_queries: Search later vi1201v2 PRs for cleanup of HSD_JObjSet*_2 helper variants or replacement with header inlines.
Search for later changes to un_80400304_t or vi1201v2 asset string/data ownership.
Search for follow-up on the .sdata2 regression reported in PR 2456.
Search current source for whether un_80320A40_OnEnter later reached a full match.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2456 metadata and changed file list
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c and .h
text_corpus: empty PR body and one decomp-dev bot issue comment
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
Automated bot evidence supports measured progress but only reports un_80320A40_OnEnter at 97.14%, not a full function match.
The slice includes a reported .sdata2 regression and does not explain whether it was accepted as a tradeoff.
No author or reviewer rationale is available for PAD_STACK(24), the local HSD_JObjSet*_2 helper variants, or the exact data-string grouping.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Propagate recovered concrete types into headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2456 shows a local global changed from u8 to GXColor in both vi1201v2.c and vi1201v2.h, enabling HSD_SetEraseColor to use r/g/b/a fields instead of byte indexing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GXColor un_804D7028 and GXColor* colors

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace placeholder prototypes when implementation evidence proves a safer signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2456 changed un_80320A40_OnEnter from UNK_T to void* in the header after adding an implementation that accepts void* and interprets it as a byte input buffer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: header prototype changed from UNK_T to void*

rejection_notes.title: Do not promote local expanded HSD_JObjSet*_2 helpers as a general cleanup pattern
rejection_notes.reason: The PR diff adds local helpers with expanded jobj.h assertions, but the loaded slice has no author/reviewer explanation and loaded standards prefer mapping identifiable header asserts back to existing inline/helper forms when possible.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetRotationY_2 and related helper variants

rejection_notes.title: Do not treat PAD_STACK(24) as an accepted tactic from this PR alone
rejection_notes.reason: PAD_STACK appears in the recovered function body, but the only validation evidence is an automated improvement report and not a specific demonstration that the stack pad was necessary.

rejection_notes.title: Do not claim full vi1201v2 text match
rejection_notes.reason: The bot report says un_80320A40_OnEnter improved to 97.14%, with a .sdata2 regression; it does not report full function or TU text completion.
